scenarios.name: Checkpoint production
assertions: Checkpoint payloads carry stable source references.

scenarios.name: Bounded continuity
assertions: Context assembly can use checkpoints to reduce prompt pressure.
Smaller-window runs do not depend on raw transcript replay.

scenarios.name: Consumer safety
assertions: Consumers can replay or resume without corrupting state.
The stream remains a projection rather than a new authority.

non_goals: Treating checkpoints as trusted durable memory
